节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides applications with APIs for obtaining SIM card status, card file information, and card specifications. SIM cards include SIM, USIM, and CSIM cards.

Checks whether the SIM card in a specified slot is activated. ranging from {@code 0} to the maximum card slot index number supported by the device. whether the SIM card in a specified slot is activated. Returns {@code true} if the SIM card is activated; returns {@code false} otherwise.
注释信息: @param { number } slotId - Indicates the card slot index number,
@param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback - Indicates the callback for checking

parameters.说明: Indicates the card slot index number,
Indicates the callback for checking

节点.功能描述: Obtains the default card slot for the voice service. the default card slot for the voice service. Returns {@code 0} if card 1 is used as the default card slot for the voice service; returns {@code 1} if card 2 is used as the default card slot for the voice service; returns {@code -1} if no card is available for the voice service.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - Indicates the callback for getting

parameters.说明: Indicates the callback for getting

节点.功能描述: Obtains the default card slot for the voice service. returns {@code 1} if card 2 is used as the default card slot for the voice service; returns {@code -1} if no card is available for the voice service.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<number> } Returns {@code 0} if card 1 is used as the default card slot for the voice service;
节点.return_description: Returns {@code 0} if card 1 is used as the default card slot for the voice service;

节点.功能描述: Checks whether your application (the caller) has been granted the operator permissions. ranging from {@code 0} to the maximum card slot index number supported by the device. Returns {@code true} if your application has been granted the operator permissions; returns {@code false} otherwise. If no SIM card is inserted or the SIM card is deactivated will be return {@code false}. 2. Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the home PLMN number of the SIM card in a specified slot.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the service provider name (SPN) of the SIM card in a specified slot.

The value is recorded in the EFSPN file of the SIM card and is irrelevant to the network with which the SIM card is currently registered. ranging from 0 to the maximum card slot index number supported by the device. returns an empty string if no SIM card is inserted or no EFSPN file in the SIM card. 2. 节点.功能描述: Indicates the SIM card type.
Indicates psim type.
Indicates esim type.
Defines the SIM card label.
Represents the SIM card type.
Represents the SIM card index.
Defines the ICC account information.
Indicates the sim Id for card.
Indicates the card slot index number, ranging from 0 to the maximum card slot index number supported by the device.
Indicates the mark card is eSim or not.
Indicates the active status for card.
Indicates the iccId for card.
Indicates the display name for card.
Indicates the display number for card.
Indicates the SIM card types.
Icc card type: unknown type Card.
Icc card type: Single sim card type.
Icc card type: Single usim card type.
Icc card type: Single ruim card type.
Icc card type: Double card C+G.
Icc card type: China Telecom Internal Roaming Card (Dual Mode).
Icc card type: China Unicom Dual Mode Card.
Icc card type: China Telecom LTE Card (Dual Mode).
Icc card type: Double card U+G.
Icc card type: Single isim card type.
Indicates the SIM card states.
Indicates unknown SIM card state, that is, the accurate status cannot be obtained.
Indicates that the SIM card is in the not present state, that is, no SIM card is inserted into the card slot.
Indicates that the SIM card is in the locked state, that is, the SIM card is locked by the personal identification number (PIN)/PIN unblocking key (PUK) or network.
Indicates that the SIM card is in the not ready state, that is, the SIM card is in position but cannot work properly.
Indicates that the SIM card is in the ready state, that is, the SIM card is in position and is working properly.
Indicates that the SIM card is in the loaded state, that is, the SIM card is in position and is working properly.
